nasb.text: He caused me to pass among them round about, and behold, there were very many on the surface of the valley; and lo, they were very dry.

esv.text: And he led me around among them, and behold, there were very many on the surface of the valley, and behold, they were very dry.

cnv.text: 他帶我在骸骨的四圍經過；我看見平原上面有很多骸骨，都非常枯乾。

ccb.text: 祂领我环绕那些骸骨走了一圈，我见到谷中枯干的骸骨相当多。
